Self.Wiki: Defines parameters relating to the camera during grab states.

cameraType.Wiki: The behavior to use for this camera.

cameraBasePosType.Wiki: The reference point to use for this camera.

copyStartDirection.Wiki: If enabled, this camera matches its orientation to the original source camera.

startTransType.Wiki: The interpolation type at the start of switching.

endTransType.Wiki: The interpolation type at the end of switching.

inCameraStartTransType.Wiki: The interpolation type for camera start.

inCameraEndTransType.Wiki: The interpolation type for camera end.

rayCollidesExecType.Wiki: The ray hit processing type, used for camera collisions.

sphereCollidesExecType.Wiki: The sphere hit processing type, used for camera collisions.

selectType.Wiki: The branching decision type when multiple exist.

startTransTime.Wiki: The interpolation time (in seconds) at the start of switching.

endTransTime.Wiki: The interpolation time (in seconds) at the end of switching.

inCameraStartTransTime.Wiki: The interpolation time (in seconds) at camera start.

inCameraEndTransTime.Wiki: The interpolation time (in seconds) at camera end.

rayWidth.Wiki: The thickness of the camera ray.

sphereSize.Wiki: The thickness of the camera sphere.
